description.value:
Frequency once per day

A typical ijtikri's leviathan transformation is their last act in life, irreversibly swelling to immense size before seeding the sea with new life. You aren't typical; you can transform into a Gargantuan ijtikri leviathan battle form for 1 minute. You can Dismiss this effect. When the effect ends, the revitalizing gases from your leviathan body fill a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], restoring @Damage[5d8[healing]|options:area-damage] Hit Points to living creatures in the area. You gain the following statistics and abilities.

  • AC = 22 + your level. Ignore your armor's check penalty and Speed reduction.
  • 10 temporary Hit Points.
  • Speed 10 feet, fly 40 feet, swim 60 feet
  • The following unarmed melee attacks. You're trained with this attack, and your attack modifier is +25. This attack is Strength based. If your unarmed attack modifier is higher, you can use it instead. Melee 1 tentacle (backswing, grapple, reach 30 feet), Damage 3d10+15 bludgeoning; Area Fire 2 wail (@Template[type:cone|distance:60]), Damage 3d10+15 sonic (basic Reflex save versus the higher of your class DC or spell DC)

  • Acrobatics modifier of +15 and Athletics modifier of +25, unless your own modifiers are higher.
